entryCondition: Authority chair and accepted alternate present with private authority minute.
exitEvidence: Private quorum note and authority acceptance reference.
stopTrigger: Stop if authority or quorum is unresolved.

entryCondition: Privacy owner confirms consent, withdrawal, outbound-email, and evidence boundaries.
exitEvidence: Privacy acceptance note and consent-boundary checklist.
stopTrigger: Stop if real participant data or outbound contact enters the test.
publicSafeLine: No real participant records are used.

entryCondition: IDS/data owner confirms retention, export, deletion, and private storage rules.
stopTrigger: Stop if evidence custody or data sovereignty is unresolved.

entryCondition: Official route owner confirms no official member, officer, club, payment, education, or incident records are used.
stopTrigger: Stop if official records or endorsement claims appear.
publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.

stopTrigger: Stop if real ABNs, revenue, client, contact, or private business records appear.
publicSafeLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test.

stopTrigger: Stop if official member records, payments, officer roles, club records, incidents, elections, or education records appear.
publicSafeLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains an unofficial fake/sample tester.

stopTrigger: Stop if wording implies launch, pilot approval, provider access, official workflow, or real records.
publicSafeLine: Public status can say preparation only.

runBlock: Provider refusal and RFQ boundary retest
entryCondition: Provider access owner confirms refusal proof and safe alternative/RFQ boundary.
exitEvidence: Provider boundary retest note and no-real-record line.
stopTrigger: Stop if provider requests or receives real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

entryCondition: Private evidence index, redaction rule, and export boundary accepted.
stopTrigger: Stop if private evidence contents are exposed publicly.

runBlock: Stop trigger and incident route drill
entryCondition: Support, incident, withdrawal, and stop routes confirmed.
exitEvidence: Incident drill minute and owner action note.
stopTrigger: Stop if support route or escalation owner is missing.

entryCondition: No live credentials, production access, or real data stores are active.
exitEvidence: Technical dry-run log and rollback note.
stopTrigger: Stop if live credentials or production systems are introduced.

entryCondition: Every P0 scenario, evidence record, stop trigger, and public line has an owner decision.
stopTrigger: Stop if any P0 result lacks owner signoff.
publicSafeLine: Repeat P0 result is private until accepted.
